_note: Replace placeholders with real publishing links and real proof artifacts before submission. Keep all metadata honest.
name: Status Zero Gas Notary
description: Status Zero Gas Notary is an AI notary clerk and smart contract for gasless public records on Status Network Sepolia. It turns natural-language operational updates into compact onchain notes with hashed source material, typed record kinds, and explorer-verifiable proof.
problemStatement: Operational teams, field crews, maintainers, and autonomous systems frequently need a cheap public proof that something happened: a delivery completed, an incident was contained, a milestone landed, or a commitment was made. Traditional onchain interactions are too high-friction for these tiny records, so they stay trapped in chat threads and docs. Status Zero Gas Notary uses Status Network's zero-fee positioning to make lightweight public commitments normal, while an AI clerk handles classification, summary shaping, and hashing so sensitive source material does not need to go fully onchain.
conversationLog: See conversationLog.md in this folder. Paste the full contents into the submission field.

submissionMetadata.agentFrameworkOther: custom notary draft builder with Solidity deployment package
submissionMetadata._note_skills: Replace with the actual loaded skill IDs from the final submission session. The submission API requires real skill identifiers, not guessed values.
submissionMetadata.intentionNotes: The project is designed to continue as a lightweight public accountability layer for field ops, open-source maintainers, and agent workflows. Post-hackathon work would focus on better mobile intake, verified signer roles, and optional private storage backends for full source material.
